meta.title: The Tasmanian Tiger
meta.sourceDoc: 57. P2 - The Tasmanian Tiger 袋狼.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：striped
PDF 解析：coat"。

题目 15
答案：australia
PDF 定位/解析：piL3:..manytypesofthylacineroamedacrossAustralia ..."-表明曾广泛分布于澳洲大陆。

题目 16
答案：12 million years
PDF 定位/解析：p?L1:"..about12millionyearsago,thenumbersof theseancientthylacinesbegantodecline."-题干：数量下降的时间点。

题目 17
答案：tasmania
PDF 定位/解析：p2L3:..Tasmania,a largeislandtothesouthofAustralia,becamethelastremainingplace..."-最后仅存地点。

题目 18
答案：europeans
PDF 定位/解析：p L4:..until Europeans...seem to have brought about their extinction."指定"the arrival of_with theirfarming practices"减少数量。

questionSections.text:
题目 19
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：P右栏s1:Rose说"*Takeitfromme,thetigerisgone."→断言已绝望。 Randolph Rose

题目 20
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：Hans Naarding 倒数第2段："Iftherearethylacinesoutthere，theyarebetteroffrightwheretheyare."→最好别去打扰。

题目 21
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：Nick Mooney P右栏s2..manysincereseekersarevictimsofobsession...itisablindoptimism..."→认为目击者不客观。

题目 22
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：P右栏s1:Pemberton引"Floridapanther"&"coelacanth"指出物种数量阅值判断"isstillkickingalong!"→传统"需要 David Pemberton 庞大族群"观点未必准确。

题目 23
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：Hans Naarding P左栏最末:"/was besieged by television crews, includingfour or fivefrom Japan,and others from the UK,Germany, NewZealandandSouthAmerica."→显示国际媒体兴趣浓厚。

题目 24
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：Nick Mooney P右栏s2首句:..newdigital photographic images...oneof themost convincing casesforthe species'survival that/haveseen."→认为访客提供的新证据可信。

questionSections.text:
题目 25
答案：B
PDF 解析：P左栏最末："Governmentandprivate searchparties combedtheregion, butno furthersightingsweremade."Naarding的目击触发了大规模后续 搜寻(extensivefollow-up)，但未捕获。

题目 26
答案：D
PDF 解析：P右栏s1:Coelacanth的故事："was thoughttohavedied outwith the 可能出错。
